markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between PromptFoo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [PromptFoo aims to become the de facto security tool for generative AI, targeting security leaders in mid-market to enterprise companies](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Content strategy will focus on establishing PromptFoo as an authoritative voice in AI security, with a mix of top-funnel and mid-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [GrowthX will develop a repeatable process for producing high-quality content, starting with careful calibration before scaling volume](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Collaboration will leverage PromptFoo's technical expertise and GrowthX's content/SEO capabilities to capitalize on emerging AI security standards and regulations](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)

## Topics

### PromptFoo Overview

  - [CEO/Co-founder: Ian Webster, engineering background](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Product: Security tool for making generative AI apps safe and secure](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Target customers: Security leaders in mid-market to enterprise companies, including CISOs, heads of application security, product security, offensive security, and red teams](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Current ACV: Five figures, with discounts to drive adoption](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Company Goals and Priorities

  - [Become the de facto security tool for generative AI](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Build a security tool that produces clear value](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Reach specific milestones for Series A funding (number of enterprise design partnerships)](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Hire a great team](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

### Target Audience and Pain Points

  - [Security leaders scrambling to secure board-level AI initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
  - [Lack of established best practices and tools for AI security](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
  - [High costs and incompleteness of current manual pen testing for AI](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)
  - [Knowledge gap in understanding AI-specific vulnerabilities](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Establish PromptFoo as an authoritative voice in AI security](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Develop repeatable process for high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Focus on both top-funnel (introductory) and mid-funnel (differentiation) content](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Leverage emerging standards (e.g., OWASP) to position content ahead of search trends](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Fragmented space with mostly newer, smaller players](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Some eval-focused competitors, but products and ICPs likely to diverge over time](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Opportunity to build authority beyond direct product offerings due to nascent market](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=2650.0)

### Content Development Approach

  - [Create topic clusters and themes aligned with product features and industry pain points](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=2570.0)
  - [Incorporate external research, PromptFoo documentation, and emerging standards](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=2570.0)
  - [Balance competitive gap analysis, product-centric content, and persona-based questions](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=2570.0)
  - [Focus on practical, high-quality content rather than generic AI security information](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=2570.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up publishing process and access (Bianca to reach out)](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Refine content strategy and share updated topic clusters for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=2570.0)
  - [Schedule weekly 30-minute sync meetings](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Aim for semi-approval of initial content assignments](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=3555.0)
  - [Generate one calibration article to establish quality benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=3581.0)
  - [Take 1-2 weeks to nail accuracy and quality before scaling volume](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=3602.0)
  - [PromptFoo to share relevant news, research papers, and emerging standards in Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/gteJuVVhTt1mqWyBAxiV5t5SevrMUy8r?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
